seoTitle: Semikron Products Distributor | IGBT, SKiiP, Gate Driver, Diode | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Browse Semikron product categories: SEMiTRANS IGBT modules, SKiiP intelligent power modules, SKYPER gate drivers, power diodes, thyristors. In stock, competitive pricing, technical support.
title: Semikron Products
description: Semikron is a leading manufacturer of power semiconductor modules and systems. Their product portfolio includes IGBT modules, intelligent power modules (IPM), gate drivers, diodes, and thyristors for industrial drives, renewable energy, and automotive applications.

faqs.question: What are the main product families offered by Semikron?
faqs.answer: Semikron offers several key product families: (1) SEMiTRANS - Standard IGBT modules in various configurations including half-bridge, full-bridge, and chopper topologies; (2) SKiiP - Intelligent Power Modules with integrated gate drive and protection; (3) SKYPER - Gate driver boards and ICs for IGBT and MOSFET control; (4) SEMiX - Press-fit modules for high reliability applications; (5) Power Diodes and Thyristors for rectification and phase control. Each family is optimized for specific applications from industrial drives to renewable energy systems.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Semikron IGBT module for my application?
faqs.answer: To select the right Semikron IGBT module: (1) Determine voltage rating - typically 600V for low voltage, 1200V for standard industrial, 1700V for high voltage applications; (2) Calculate current requirements based on load power and DC bus voltage; (3) Choose package style - SEMiTRANS for standard applications, SKiiP for integrated solutions, SEMiX for press-fit; (4) Consider thermal requirements and cooling method; (5) Evaluate switching frequency needs. Our FAE team can provide detailed selection guidance based on your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What makes SKiiP modules different from standard IGBT modules?
faqs.answer: SKiiP (Semikron Integrated Intelligent Power) modules offer several advantages: (1) Integrated gate drive circuitry with advanced protection features; (2) Current sensing and temperature monitoring built-in; (3) Reduced external component count simplifying PCB design; (4) Higher reliability due to reduced interconnections; (5) Faster time-to-market with proven integrated solutions. SKiiP modules are ideal for applications requiring compact design with high reliability such as servo drives, HVAC, and pump inverters.

categories.name: IGBT Modules
categories.description: Semikron SEMiTRANS IGBT power modules in half-bridge, full-bridge, and chopper configurations for industrial drives and power conversion.
categories.longDescription: Semikron SEMiTRANS IGBT modules are industry-standard power modules designed for high-performance motor drives, inverters, and power supplies. Available in voltage ratings from 600V to 1700V and current ratings from 15A to 600A, these modules offer excellent thermal performance and reliability. The SEMiTRANS 4 package is widely used in industrial applications requiring high power density and long operational life.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on voltage rating (600V/1200V/1700V), current requirement, and package size. Consider switching frequency and thermal management requirements.

products.name: SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT Module 200A 1200V
products.shortDescription: High-power SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module with 200A collector current and 1200V voltage rating for industrial motor drives.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKM200GB12T4 is a SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module featuring two IGBT switches in half-bridge configuration. With 200A continuous collector current and 1200V blocking voltage, it is ideal for high-power motor drives and inverters.
This module uses Trenchgate technology for low conduction losses and optimized switching characteristics. The integrated NTC temperature sensor enables reliable thermal monitoring.
The standard SEMiTRANS 4 package ensures compatibility with industry-standard heatsinks and mounting hardware. RoHS compliant construction meets environmental requirements.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKM200GB12T4 is our most popular IGBT module for 10-50kW motor drives. The 200A rating with 1200V provides excellent margin for 380-480V AC applications. Customers appreciate the consistent quality and long-term availability. For switching frequencies above 8kHz, consider adding external snubber circuits to manage switching losses.

products.name: SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT Module 400A 1200V
products.shortDescription: High-power SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module with 400A collector current for large industrial drives and inverters.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKM400GB12T4 is a high-current SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module designed for demanding industrial applications. With 400A continuous collector current, it can handle motor drives up to 200kW.

Advanced Trenchgate technology provides excellent trade-off between conduction and switching losses. The module is optimized for switching frequencies from 2kHz to 15kHz typical for motor drive applications.
Robust construction with direct copper bonded (DCB) substrate ensures excellent thermal performance and long operational life. The integrated NTC thermistor provides accurate temperature monitoring.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For high-power motor drives above 75kW, the SKM400GB12T4 is the go-to solution. The 400A rating provides excellent current capability with good safety margins. Pay attention to gate drive requirements - use a robust gate driver like SKYPER 42 with proper desaturation protection. Thermal management is critical; ensure adequate heatsink capacity for continuous operation.

products.name: SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT Module 100A 1200V
products.shortDescription: Compact SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module with 100A collector current for small to medium motor drives.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKM100GB12T4 is a compact SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module ideal for small to medium power applications. With 100A collector current, it is well-suited for servo drives and small motor controls.
The module features fast Trenchgate IGBT technology for efficient switching at frequencies up to 20kHz. Low switching losses enable compact system design with smaller heatsinks.
Standard SEMiTRANS 4 package ensures mechanical compatibility with industry-standard mounting and cooling solutions. The integrated NTC provides temperature feedback for protection circuits.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKM100GB12T4 is perfect for servo drives and small motor applications in the 5-25kW range. Its compact size and good switching characteristics make it popular in space-constrained designs. The 100A rating with 1200V provides good safety margins for 230-400V applications. Consider this for HVAC, pump, and fan drives.
faeReview.highlight: Compact 100A module, good for servo drives

products.name: SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT Module 600A 1200V
products.shortDescription: Ultra-high-power SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module with 600A collector current for largest industrial applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKM600GB12T4 is Semikron's highest current SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT module, delivering 600A continuous collector current. It is designed for the most demanding high-power applications including large industrial drives and traction systems.
Advanced Trenchgate 4 technology provides industry-leading conduction and switching performance. The module is optimized for high reliability in continuous operation applications.
Robust DCB substrate and advanced packaging technology ensure excellent thermal cycling capability for long operational life. The module meets stringent industrial quality standards.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For the largest motor drives above 150kW, the SKM600GB12T4 delivers unmatched performance. The 600A rating handles even the most demanding load profiles. Critical design considerations include: robust gate driving with SKYPER 52, excellent thermal management with liquid cooling recommended, and proper snubber design for switching stress management. This module is used in wind turbines, large industrial drives, and traction applications.

categories.name: SKiiP Intelligent Power Modules
categories.description: Semikron SKiiP intelligent power modules with integrated gate drive and protection for compact inverter designs.
categories.longDescription: SKiiP (Semikron Integrated Intelligent Power) modules combine IGBT power semiconductors with integrated gate drive circuitry, protection features, and current sensing in a compact package. These ready-to-use modules significantly reduce design time and improve reliability by eliminating external gate drive components and interconnections. SKiiP modules are ideal for servo drives, HVAC systems, pump inverters, and other applications requiring compact, reliable power conversion.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on current rating, voltage class, and required protection features. Consider cooling requirements and switching frequency.

products.name: SKiiP 3 Intelligent Power Module 39A 1200V
products.shortDescription: Compact SKiiP 3 IPM with 39A output current and integrated gate drive for small motor drives up to 7.5kW.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKiiP 39AC12T4V1 is a compact intelligent power module integrating a complete 3-phase inverter with 39A output capability. The built-in gate drive includes short-circuit protection, undervoltage lockout, and interlock functions.
This module features Trenchgate IGBT technology for low losses and high efficiency. The integrated current sensing eliminates the need for external current sensors in many applications.
The compact package and minimal external component requirements make this ideal for space-constrained designs such as servo drives and small HVAC systems.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKiiP 39AC12T4V1 is excellent for compact servo drives and small motor applications. The integrated gate drive saves significant PCB space and design time. Current sensing is accurate enough for most vector control applications. For 230V systems up to 7.5kW, this is a cost-effective solution with fast time-to-market.

products.name: SKiiP 3 Intelligent Power Module 83A 1200V
products.shortDescription: Mid-range SKiiP 3 IPM with 83A output current for motor drives up to 15kW with integrated protection.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKiiP 83AC12T4V1 provides 83A output current in a compact intelligent power module package. The integrated gate drive with advanced protection features ensures reliable operation in demanding industrial environments.

This module includes comprehensive protection: short-circuit detection with soft shutdown, undervoltage lockout for all supply voltages, and over-temperature monitoring. The fault feedback enables fast system response.
Optimized for 400V AC motor drives up to 15kW, this module offers an excellent balance of performance, size, and cost for industrial applications.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For 11-15kW motor drives, the SKiiP 83AC12T4V1 is a popular choice. The integrated protection features save design time and improve reliability. The 83A rating provides good margins for high-torque applications. Recommended for HVAC, pump, and conveyor drives where reliability is important.

products.name: SKiiP 3 Intelligent Power Module 124A 1200V
products.shortDescription: High-current SKiiP 3 IPM with 124A output current for motor drives up to 22kW.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKiiP 124AC12T4V1 delivers 124A output current for high-power applications in a compact intelligent module. The integrated gate drive and protection simplify system design while ensuring reliable operation.
This module features advanced Trenchgate IGBT technology optimized for low switching losses at frequencies up to 16kHz. The integrated NTC temperature sensor enables accurate thermal monitoring.
Designed for 400V AC motor drives up to 22kW, this module is ideal for industrial pumps, compressors, and material handling equipment.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKiiP 124AC12T4V1 is excellent for higher power drives in the 18-22kW range. The 124A rating handles demanding load profiles with good thermal margins. The integrated current sensing is accurate for field-oriented control. Pay attention to heatsink design - this module needs good thermal management for continuous operation at full load.

products.name: SKiiP 4 Intelligent Power Module 181A 1200V
products.shortDescription: Advanced SKiiP 4 IPM with 181A output current and enhanced protection for high-power drives up to 37kW.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKiiP 1813GB123 is a next-generation SKiiP 4 intelligent power module delivering 181A output current. Advanced Trenchgate 4 technology provides industry-leading efficiency and performance.

This module features enhanced protection including active short-circuit protection, advanced thermal monitoring, and comprehensive fault diagnostics. The improved gate drive enables faster switching with lower losses.
Designed for high-performance motor drives up to 37kW, this module is ideal for demanding industrial applications requiring high reliability and efficiency.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKiiP 1813GB123 represents the latest in IPM technology. The 181A rating with advanced Trenchgate 4 provides excellent performance for high-power drives. The enhanced protection features and diagnostics make this ideal for critical applications. For 30-37kW drives requiring high reliability, this is the recommended solution.

categories.name: Gate Drivers
categories.description: Semikron SKYPER gate driver boards and ICs for IGBT and MOSFET control with advanced protection features.
categories.longDescription: SKYPER gate drivers provide reliable control and protection for IGBT and MOSFET power semiconductors. Available as compact driver cores, complete driver boards, and driver ICs, SKYPER products offer features including desaturation protection, active clamping, and isolated DC-DC power supplies. These drivers are optimized for Semikron power modules but can also be used with other IGBT and MOSFET devices.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on IGBT module requirements, protection features needed, and power level. Consider isolation requirements and switching frequency.

products.name: SKYPER 32 Gate Driver Board
products.shortDescription: Compact dual-channel gate driver board for SEMiTRANS 2/3/4 modules up to 200A with desaturation protection.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKYPER 32 R is a compact dual-channel gate driver board designed for SEMiTRANS IGBT modules. It provides reliable gate drive with ±15V output voltage and up to 8A peak gate current.
This driver includes desaturation protection for short-circuit detection, active clamping for overvoltage protection, and isolated DC-DC power supply. The electrical isolation exceeds 4000V.
Optimized for SEMiTRANS 2, 3, and 4 modules up to 200A, this driver is ideal for industrial motor drives and power conversion applications.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKYPER 32 R is our most popular gate driver for SEMiTRANS modules up to 200A. The desaturation protection is reliable and the active clamping prevents overvoltage spikes effectively. For standard industrial drives, this driver offers the best balance of features and cost. Ensure proper layout following Semikron's application notes for best performance.

products.name: SKYPER 42 Advanced Gate Driver
products.shortDescription: Advanced dual-channel gate driver with full protection for high-power SEMiTRANS 4 modules up to 600A.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKYPER 42 LJ is an advanced gate driver designed for high-power SEMiTRANS 4 IGBT modules. It provides ±15V gate drive with up to 15A peak current for fast switching of large IGBTs.

This driver features comprehensive protection: desaturation detection with soft shutdown, active Miller clamping, overvoltage clamping, and undervoltage lockout. The fault feedback enables fast system response.
With reinforced isolation and high noise immunity, this driver is ideal for demanding industrial applications with high-power IGBT modules.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For high-power SEMiTRANS modules like SKM400GB12T4 and SKM600GB12T4, the SKYPER 42 LJ is essential. The 15A gate current ensures fast switching to minimize losses. The soft shutdown during desaturation prevents overvoltage damage. This driver has proven reliability in wind turbines and large industrial drives. Follow Semikron's layout guidelines closely for optimal performance.
faeReview.highlight: 15A gate current, soft shutdown, high power

products.name: SKYPER 12 Driver Core
products.shortDescription: Compact gate driver core for custom designs with 4A peak gate current and basic protection.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKYPER 12 is a compact gate driver core designed for integration into custom driver boards. It provides isolated gate drive with 4A peak current for IGBTs up to 100A.
This driver core includes basic protection features and isolated DC-DC power supply. The compact SIP package enables flexible PCB layout in space-constrained designs.
Ideal for OEM applications requiring custom driver designs, this core provides the essential isolation and drive capability while allowing customization of protection and interface circuits.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKYPER 12 is perfect for custom driver designs where space is limited. The 4A gate current handles smaller IGBTs well. OEM customers appreciate the flexibility to add their own protection and interface circuits. For volumes above 1000 units annually, custom driver boards using SKYPER 12 cores can be cost-effective. We provide reference designs to accelerate development.

products.name: SKYPER 52 High-Power Gate Driver
products.shortDescription: Ultra-high-power gate driver with 30A peak current for largest IGBT modules and series connections.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKYPER 52 is Semikron's highest power gate driver, delivering 30A peak gate current for the largest IGBT modules. It supports series-connected IGBTs for very high voltage applications.

This driver features advanced protection including active short-circuit protection, dynamic active clamping, and comprehensive fault management. The reinforced isolation system ensures safety in high-voltage applications.
Designed for traction drives, grid converters, and other ultra-high-power applications, this driver provides the performance and reliability needed for critical systems.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKYPER 52 is designed for the most demanding applications. The 30A gate current ensures fast switching of even the largest IGBTs like SKM600GB12T4. The series connection support enables multi-level converters for MV drives. This driver is used in railway traction, wind turbines, and grid-scale energy storage. Extensive protection features ensure reliable operation in harsh environments.

categories.name: Diodes and Thyristors
categories.description: Semikron power diodes and thyristors for rectification, phase control, and power conversion applications.
categories.longDescription: Semikron offers a comprehensive range of power diodes and thyristors (SCRs) for rectification, phase control, and power conversion. These devices are available in various package styles including stud mount, flat base, and module configurations. With current ratings from a few amps to over 1000A and voltage ratings up to 6000V, Semikron diodes and thyristors serve industrial, traction, and renewable energy applications.
categories.selectionGuide: Select based on current rating, voltage class, and recovery characteristics. Consider thermal requirements and mounting style.

products.name: Semikron Diode Module 162A 1600V
products.shortDescription: Dual diode module with 162A average current and 1600V blocking voltage for rectifier applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKKD 162/16 is a dual diode module in standard SEMiTRANS 2 package. With 162A average forward current and 1600V repetitive peak reverse voltage, it is ideal for three-phase rectifiers.
This module features low forward voltage drop for high efficiency and excellent thermal performance. The electrically isolated base plate simplifies heatsink mounting.
Standard SEMiTRANS 2 package ensures compatibility with industry-standard heatsinks and mounting hardware. The module is RoHS compliant.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKKD 162/16 is a workhorse for rectifier applications. The 162A rating with 1600V provides excellent margins for 380-480V AC systems. Low forward drop keeps conduction losses manageable. This module is widely used in DC power supplies, battery chargers, and motor drive input rectifiers. For higher currents, parallel connection is straightforward with proper current sharing design.

products.name: Semikron Fast Diode Module 600A 1600V
products.shortDescription: Fast recovery diode module with 600A average current for high-frequency rectification and freewheeling.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKKE 600/16 is a high-current fast recovery diode module designed for high-frequency applications. With 600A average current and 1600V rating, it handles high-power rectification with fast switching.
This module features fast recovery time for low switching losses at high frequencies. The robust construction with DCB substrate ensures excellent thermal performance.
Ideal for output rectifiers in welding equipment, SMPS, and freewheeling diodes in motor drives where fast recovery is essential.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For high-frequency rectification above 10kHz, the SKKE 600/16 is excellent. The fast recovery minimizes switching losses and EMI. The 600A rating handles high-current applications. We commonly use this in welding power supplies and large SMPS. Ensure adequate snubbing as fast diodes can produce high reverse recovery spikes.

products.name: Semikron Thyristor Module 552A 1600V
products.shortDescription: Dual thyristor (SCR) module with 552A average current for phase control and power regulation.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKT 552/16E is a dual thyristor module designed for phase control applications. With 552A average on-state current and 1600V repetitive peak off-state voltage, it handles high-power AC control.
This module features low on-state voltage drop and high surge current capability. The electrically isolated base plate simplifies mounting and cooling.
Ideal for soft starters, motor speed controls, power regulators, and heating controls requiring phase-angle control of AC power.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: The SKT 552/16E is our standard thyristor for phase control applications. The 552A rating with 1600V handles most industrial AC control needs. Low on-state voltage keeps losses down during conduction. This module is widely used in soft starters, heating controls, and motor speed regulators. Ensure proper gate drive with sufficient current for reliable triggering.

products.name: Semikron Stud Diode 135A 1700V
products.shortDescription: High-power stud mount diode with 135A average current and 1700V rating for high-reliability rectifiers.
descriptionParagraphs: The SKN 135F17 is a high-power stud mount diode designed for demanding rectifier applications. With 135A average forward current and 1700V blocking capability, it provides reliable performance in harsh environments.
The stud mount package with threaded base enables secure mounting to heatsinks with excellent thermal contact. The hermetic seal ensures long-term reliability.
Ideal for traction rectifiers, industrial power supplies, and other applications requiring high reliability and easy replacement.

faeReview.author: Senior FAE
faeReview.content: For applications requiring field-replaceable diodes, the SKN 135F17 stud mount is ideal. The threaded mounting is secure and the hermetic package is very reliable. We use these in traction rectifiers and industrial power systems. The 135A/1700V rating covers most medium-power needs. Ensure proper torque when mounting to maintain thermal contact.
